archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Dark Command Center)

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat solid background, sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none), 1px solid stroke (border-white/10). No soft shadows.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision, but dense inner layouts for data.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and forms. Center-align only for empty states or specialized graph views.

components.kill_switch: Massive or prominent button. Red background (bg-[#FF3B30] hover:bg-red-500), white text, uppercase, with a striped warning border or bold outline.
components.threat_map: Dark canvas graph. Nodes representing assets, edges representing relationships. Use glowing dots (red/amber) for risk annotations.
components.audit_log: Retro-Futurism / Terminal look. Black background, JetBrains Mono font, green/amber/white text, hash-chained events displayed distinctly.
components.badges: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), 1px border matching the severity color, transparent or 10% opacity background.
components.tables: Dense rows, 1px bottom border on rows (border-white/10). Sticky headers with backdrop-blur. Monospaced numbers for metrics.
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized: sharp corners, pure black input backgrounds, white borders on focus.
components.navigation: Dense top navbar or compact sidebar. Crystal glass effect (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl) with 1px border.
components.approval_gate: Neumorphic 'Clay & Crisp' variant but dark. Hard borders with high contrast Accept/Deny buttons.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. E.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white. Border color brightens on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out. Minimal scaling (e.g., active:scale-[0.98]) for buttons. NO bouncy springs.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight, sharp, functional. Avoid duotone for data-dense areas.

media_urls.description: Abstract dark mesh network, perfect for login screen background or subtle threat map underlay.
Security operations data map showing red infection clusters. Can be used in onboarding or as a placeholder graphic.
Serious professional portrait for operator profile.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against dark backgrounds. Use Text Shadow if placed over complex mesh backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings around interactive elements. Do not rely solely on color.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="kill-switch-btn"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using a strict 'Control Room' grid layout. Avoid unnecessary white space; utilize density effectively.
Write code for React in .js or .jsx files, NOT TypeScript (.tsx). Ensure Shadcn components are generated/adapted for JS.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts to ensure maximum control over the grid and borders.
Customize Shadcn components by removing default soft shadows and increasing border contrast (use 1px solid borders).
Implement the Kill Switch prominently in the Live Engagement Console. It must require a confirmation step (Approval Gate).
For the Threat Map, use Visx or Recharts. If using a custom canvas, ensure the background is #0A0A0A to blend with the UI.
Ensure the Audit Log viewer has a distinct 'Terminal' aesthetic: JetBrains Mono font, black background, green/white text for chain events.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed' for an authoritative, heavy-weight tactical feel.
Apply `data-testid` to all buttons, links, inputs, and major sections as per the testing rules.
